creator: dinoex@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Helge Oldach from comment #4)

1)
In progress.

2)
mailer.conf.sample would conflict with other ports.
automatic activation work block use cases,
where the binaries are needed but not the service in base.

3)
Where is -p missing ?

The macro has -p included;

$ make -V MKDIR
/bin/mkdir -p
